title: Add 2 more verified mainnet lightwalletd endpoints
description:
What: Extend DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS in wallet/src/client.rs from 1 to 3 verified public mainnet Zcash lightwalletd endpoints.

Algorithm:
1. Research public mainnet lightwalletd endpoints from zcash community sources (Zec Wallet, Nighthawk, Unstoppable Wallet etc.)
2. Verify each candidate by attempting a GetLatestBlock RPC call using the existing test infrastructure or manual check
3. Add 2-3 verified endpoints to DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS array in client.rs
4. Update the existing test (default_mainnet_endpoints_are_https) to assert len >= 2

Defensive programming rules:
- All endpoints must start with 'https://' (enforced by existing test)
- Do not remove the existing ECC endpoint; only add to it
- Do not hardcode IP addresses (domain names only, for TLS SNI to work correctly)
- Leave a code comment with the endpoint operator name for auditability

Agent team: R (research known public endpoints) + I (add to client.rs) + T (verify test still passes, add len assertion)

Tests:
- test name: default_mainnet_endpoints_are_https — oracle: existing test logic; assertion: all HTTPS, len >= 2
- test name: default_endpoints_len_at_least_two — new test; oracle: hardcoded constant 2; assertion: DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS.len() >= 2
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --package nie-wallet -- client::tests passes; default_mainnet_endpoints_are_https still passes; DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS.len() >= 2; cargo clippy -D warnings clean
